title: Youbin He
text: Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer and prospective M.S./Ph.D. applicant in GeoAI, AI for Remote Sensing, Ecological Remote Sensing, Wildfire Risk Modeling, and Spatial Machine Learning.

title: Selected Research Projects
text: Wildfire driving factor modeling, operational remote sensing systems, ecological environment assessment, and remote sensing scene classification.

title: Publications
text: Manuscript under review and conference papers in SPIE and IEEE proceedings.

title: Selected Code & Reproducible Research
text: Python geospatial processing, remote sensing product automation, machine learning, SHAP, GeoShapley, PyTorch, and Google Earth Engine.
